title: Commonwealth Legislative Drafting Manual
aboutHtml:
This site translates the Commonwealth Legislative Drafting Manual into a dynamic web-native application. The Manual has historically served as a foundational resource and practical guide for legislative counsel across Commonwealth member countries, promoting clarity, consistency, and modernized approaches like plain language in legislation. The original Manual is released under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0).

The pipeline to convert and structure the raw PDFs into organized HTML content, as well as the robust display UI, is available open-source. For the generic conversion engine used to build this site, please visit the pdf-convert-llm repository.
